title: DialogOpenHostFolderMethod
description: Contract for dialog.openHostFolder. ELECTRON-HANDLED ONLY — this method is intercepted by Electron main and never forwarded to the Go core. It opens the native macOS/Windows folder picker.

DialogOpenHostFolderRequest.title: DialogOpenHostFolderRequest
DialogOpenHostFolderRequest.description: No params needed for the dialog.

DialogOpenHostFolderResponse.title: DialogOpenHostFolderResponse
DialogOpenHostFolderResponse.description: The selected folder path, or null if the user dismissed the dialog.

path.description: Absolute path chosen by the user, or null if cancelled
